steps: Opened the app at desktop viewport.
Moved from Theater to Army Camp.
Moved from Deployment to Battle Command.
Verified selected-unit command-transmission forecast, reason, and penalty text.
Enabled queued command mode, queued Elastic Defense, and verified queued transmission forecast.
Applied queued commands, verified active messenger chip and detailed reasons.
Ran the battle at 1x until the order arrived, then verified pending state cleared and arrival log appeared.

results.mobileQa: skipped; mobile/cellphone QA is outside the active target

evidence.initialForecast: 伝令予測 3秒 / 標準命令 基礎3秒 / 接敵余裕 / 即応53で+1秒 / 士気安定 / 指揮幕僚-1秒
evidence.activeReason: 伝令判断 標準命令 基礎3秒 / 接敵余裕 / 即応53で+1秒 / 士気安定 / 指揮幕僚-1秒
evidence.arrivalLog: 第1戦列歩兵大隊へ弾性防御が到達。
evidence.postArrivalForecast: 伝令予測 2秒 / 標準命令 基礎3秒 / 接敵余裕 / 即応良好 / 士気安定 / 指揮幕僚-1秒
